name: doclify-guardrail
description: Quality gate for your Markdown docs. Zero dependencies, catches errors in seconds.

scripts.reliability:pr: node scripts/run-corpus.mjs --manifest bench/corpus.manifest.json --profile deterministic --tag pr-sample --repeat 2 --out bench/out/pr-deterministic.json && node scripts/compare-baseline.mjs --current bench/out/pr-deterministic.json --baseline bench/baselines/pr-deterministic.json --thresholds bench/reliability-thresholds.json --waivers bench/waivers.json --report bench/out/pr-deterministic-report.md
scripts.reliability:nightly:det: node scripts/run-corpus.mjs --manifest bench/corpus.manifest.json --profile deterministic --tag nightly-det-full --repeat 3 --out bench/out/nightly-deterministic.json && node scripts/compare-baseline.mjs --current bench/out/nightly-deterministic.json --baseline bench/baselines/nightly-deterministic.json --thresholds bench/reliability-thresholds.json --waivers bench/waivers.json --report bench/out/nightly-deterministic-report.md
scripts.reliability:nightly:net: node scripts/run-corpus.mjs --manifest bench/corpus.manifest.json --profile network --tag nightly-net-sample --repeat 1 --out bench/out/nightly-network.json && node scripts/compare-baseline.mjs --current bench/out/nightly-network.json --baseline bench/baselines/nightly-network.json --thresholds bench/reliability-thresholds.json --waivers bench/waivers.json --report bench/out/nightly-network-report.md
scripts.reliability:bootstrap: node scripts/run-corpus.mjs --manifest bench/corpus.manifest.json --profile deterministic --tag pr-sample --repeat 3 --out bench/out/pr-deterministic.json && cp bench/out/pr-deterministic.json bench/baselines/pr-deterministic.json && node scripts/run-corpus.mjs --manifest bench/corpus.manifest.json --profile deterministic --tag nightly-det-full --repeat 3 --out bench/out/nightly-deterministic.json && cp bench/out/nightly-deterministic.json bench/baselines/nightly-deterministic.json && node scripts/run-corpus.mjs --manifest bench/corpus.manifest.json --profile network --tag nightly-net-sample --repeat 1 --out bench/out/nightly-network.json && cp bench/out/nightly-network.json bench/baselines/nightly-network.json
